Description

BackgroundMusicSystem
A utility class to manage background music.
BoundingBoxComponent
 
ButtonEntity
 
ButtonEntity.ButtonClickListener
 
Cache<K,V>
A cache, used to store the results of expensive computations.
CacheableRendererComponent<K>
A utility to facilitate caching UIRendererComponents' draw results as images, used for components whose draw method is very expensive.
Component
An abstract Component class.
Entity
Represents an object that has Components and can be acted upon by JSystems.
FileUtil
 
FontLoader
Utility class to load fonts
GameCanvas
A canvas on which to draw stuff.
GameState
An abstract class representing a game state in a StateMachine
GameWindow
A basic class representing a game window.
HasBoundingBox
 
HorizontalLayoutEntity
 
HoverDetectionComponent
A component that detects whether a given GameObject is currently hovered
ImageEntity
 
ImageLoader
Utility class to load images from files
ImageRendererComponent
Allows the gameObject to draw an image
InstantaneousGameState
A GameState that executes a single action.
